response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine staff-level credentials, meaningful high-throughput distributed systems experience from Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second), and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly maps to the AI-native engineering environment. However, Python — a must-have skill — is entirely absent from his resume and skill list, which is a meaningful gap. His distributed systems work is also six-plus years old, and there is limited evidence of formal stakeholder management or cross-functional technical strategy at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP-based tooling, directly aligned with the AI-native engineering environment the role operates in
Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Consistent staff-level titling across multiple employers with evidence of technical mentorship, tooling ownership, and IC-to-strategy transitions
concerns: Python is listed as a must-have skill but is completely absent from the resume, skills section, and all described project work
High-throughput distributed systems experience is concentrated in a role that ended in 2020; more recent work skews toward product-layer TypeScript and tooling rather than infrastructure at scale
No explicit evidence of stakeholder management across functions, incident response ownership, or on-call operational experience
